process.heading: From idea to launch in 4 steps
process.subheading: A clear, collaborative process that keeps you informed and in control at every stage.
process.step1Desc: We map out your goals, audience, and requirements in a focused kickoff session. No fluff — just clarity.
process.step2Desc: Wireframes and high-fidelity mockups. You approve every detail before a single line of code is written.
process.step3Desc: Clean, tested, production-ready code delivered in transparent sprints with regular check-ins and demos.
process.step4Desc: Deployment, performance monitoring, and post-launch support to make sure everything runs flawlessly.

testimonials.heading: Trusted by businesses across Europe
testimonials.subheading: Real results from real collaborations — no filler, no stock quotes.
testimonials.1quote: Adrian delivered our platform two weeks ahead of schedule. The code quality and attention to detail genuinely exceeded our expectations.
testimonials.2quote: Working with Adrian felt like having a senior developer in-house. Responsive, proactive, and highly skilled — exactly what we needed.
testimonials.3quote: Our conversion rate jumped 40% after the redesign. The performance improvements alone paid for the entire project within the first month.

about.heading: Senior developer, based in Romania
about.body1: I'm Adrian — a full-stack developer with 5+ years building web products for startups and established businesses across Europe. I specialise in the modern JavaScript ecosystem: Next.js, React, TypeScript, and Node.js.
about.body2: I care deeply about performance, clean code, and delivering real business value. Every project gets the same precision and dedication, whether it's a landing page or a complex SaaS platform.

hero.heading: Premium web development
hero.subheading: End-to-end digital products — from design to deployment. Fast, scalable, and built to last.

why.heading: The difference you'll actually feel
why.subheading: Not just another agency promise — tangible commitments built on five years of real project experience.
why.i1Desc: Every project is documented, tested, and structured so any developer can take it over. No proprietary lock-in, no spaghetti.
why.i2Desc: You work directly with me — no account managers, no layers. You always know exactly where your project stands.
why.i3Desc: I set deadlines I can actually keep. If anything changes, you hear from me first — not the day before launch.
why.i4Desc: I stay involved after delivery. Monitoring, fixes, and iterations are part of every engagement — not paid extras.

tech.heading: Tools I ship with
tech.subheading: A modern, battle-tested stack chosen for performance, scalability, and long-term maintainability.

faq.heading: Common questions
faq.subheading: Everything you need to know before we start working together.
faq.q1: What is your typical project timeline?
faq.a1: It depends on scope. A landing page takes 2–3 weeks; a full web application typically 6–12 weeks. I give you a detailed, itemised estimate after our discovery call — no guesswork.
faq.q2: Do you work with startups or established companies?
faq.a2: Both. I've built MVPs for early-stage founders and shipped production features for companies with millions of users. The process and communication style adapt to your stage.
faq.q3: What does the maintenance package include?
faq.a3: Monthly dependency updates, priority bug fixes, uptime & error monitoring, security patches, and a dedicated support channel — all for a fixed monthly fee agreed upfront.
faq.q4: How do you handle revisions and feedback?
faq.a4: Every project has structured revision rounds built into the timeline. Feedback is collected asynchronously and addressed in focused sessions — not scattered, endless back-and-forth.
faq.a5: Both are available. Fixed price suits well-defined projects. Hourly or retainer billing works better for ongoing work, evolving scopes, or long-term partnerships.
faq.q6: Can you work with an existing codebase or design?
faq.a6: Yes. I start with a code or design audit to understand what's already there, then integrate cleanly. I work comfortably in any modern JavaScript or TypeScript stack.
faq.q7: What happens after the project launches?
faq.a7: Every project includes a 30-day post-launch support window at no extra cost. After that, you can move to a maintenance retainer or reach out on a per-request basis.
faq.a8: Send a short message describing your project. We book a free 30-minute discovery call, I prepare a detailed proposal, and we kick off from there — usually within a week.

hero.heading: I build digital products

story.heading: From first line of code to full-stack
story.subheading: The milestones that shaped how I think, build, and deliver.
story.m1Desc: Taught myself HTML, CSS, and JavaScript through online courses and side projects. Built my first website for a local business — no frameworks, no build tools, just curiosity.
story.m2Desc: Landed my first freelance client: a custom WordPress site with e-commerce. Learned that clients care about outcomes, not code elegance.
story.m3Desc: Moved into full-stack development with Node.js and PostgreSQL. Transitioned to freelancing full-time, working with startups across Romania and Germany.
story.m4Desc: Deep-dived into Next.js, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS. Shipped my first SaaS product and started building long-term client relationships.
story.m5Desc: Working with clients in Romania, Germany, Norway, and Denmark. Every project still gets the same attention to detail as the very first one.

skills.heading: Technologies I work with daily
skills.subheading: A modern, battle-tested stack chosen for performance, developer experience, and long-term maintainability.

values.heading: The principles behind every project
values.subheading: Not just a set of tools — a way of thinking about software that makes products better and collaborations smoother.
values.v1Desc: Every line of code is written to be read, tested, and maintained. Fast delivery never comes at the cost of correctness or clarity.
values.v2Desc: You always know where your project stands. No surprises, no hidden blockers — just clear, direct updates at every stage.
values.v3Desc: I only commit to deadlines I can keep. If scope changes, you hear from me first — not on launch day.
values.v4Desc: I build systems designed to grow with your business, not technical debt you'll pay back in six months.

types.heading: Choose your partnership model
types.subheading: Three structured ways to collaborate — whether you're an agency, a consultant, or a satisfied client.

referral.title: Referral Partner
referral.description: Know someone who needs a web product built? Refer them and earn a commission on every completed project — no technical knowledge required.
referral.b2: Tracked referral links with real-time reporting
referral.b3: No cap on earnings — refer as many as you like
referral.b5: Monthly payouts via bank transfer or PayPal

agency.title: Agency Partner
agency.description: Agencies and studios can white-label my development services. I work behind the scenes — you keep your client relationship and margin.
agency.b2: Dedicated Slack channel for project coordination
agency.b4: Joint NDA and IP protection agreements

technology.title: Technology Partner
technology.description: SaaS platforms, tools, and developer products can partner to build certified integrations, co-market, and publish joint case studies.
technology.b2: Listed as technology partner on this site
technology.b3: Joint case studies and technical blog posts
technology.b5: Early access to new integration capabilities

benefits.heading: What you get from day one
benefits.subheading: Concrete benefits, not vague promises — every partnership tier comes with tangible value from the start.
benefits.b1Desc: Transparent, on-time commission payouts with no hidden deductions or fine print.
benefits.b2Desc: Mutual referrals — I send relevant leads your way whenever projects fall outside my scope.
benefits.b3Desc: Partners get first access to my calendar before public availability opens.
benefits.b4Desc: Joint social content, case studies, and cross-promotion to both our audiences.
benefits.b5Desc: A direct line for questions, project updates, and issues — no ticket queues.
benefits.b6Desc: Access to my vetted network of designers, copywriters, and other specialists.
